panels.title: Desired vs Tracked vs Cloud Count

targets.expr: sum (increase(autoscaling_instance_launched_total[10m] offset 15m)) by (group) > 0 and (max(max_over_time(autoscaling_instance_running[25m])) by (group) == min(min_over_time(autoscaling_instance_running[25m])) by (group))

sum(http_server_request_duration_seconds_sum{environment=~"$environment", region=~"$region", service="autoscaler"}) by (method, uri) / sum(http_server_request_duration_seconds_count{service=~"jitsi-autoscaler|autoscaler"}) by (method, uri)
